jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Doubtnut
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
